## Problem

<!-- What user problem does this solve? Describe the situation or need. -->

<!-- Describe the feature or change you want. Include any relevant mockups or sketches. -->

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why did you rule them out? -->

## Completion Criteria

<!-- Check these boxes as the feature is implemented -->

- [ ] Feature works as described
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing functionality
- [ ] Code passes lint checks

<!-- Include any repo, runtime, or rollout constraints, or related issues/PRs -->
